label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Jennifer could have gone to the swimming pool. So, the question is saying that today Jennifer went to the swimming pool, and we need to determine between which times she could have done that, given the various activities she was seen doing by different people. First, let me list out all the known activities and their times. Jennifer woke up at 5am. That's the starting point. Then, Richard saw her at the office from 5am to 8am. So, from 5 to 8, she was working at the office. Then, Samantha saw her reading at the library from 12pm to 1pm. Then Betty saw her buying a bike at the bike shop from 1pm to 2pm. Sarah saw her buying a phone at the electronics store from 2pm to 9pm. Thomas saw her walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9pm to 10pm. Also, the swimming pool was closed after 10pm. The options given are A) 8am to 12pm, B) 9pm to 10pm, C) 2pm to 9pm, D) 12pm
